overview: codeWithcrush is an AI-powered gamified Computer Science learning platform that blends dating-sim style interactions with advanced AI teaching. Users engage with cartoon avatar companions, solve coding challenges across 15+ domains, earn XP and rewards, and connect with a social community — all with voice and ChatGPT-quality AI responses.
features: 15+ structured CS domains with Module 0 orientation, 5+ modules, quizzes, and certificates
Meta AI-style chatbot with animated bubbles, quick-reply suggestions, and behaviour-adaptive responses
Two-way voice chat — user mic + ElevenLabs AI voice
Code correctness checker across compiler, problems, practice, and tests
GeeksforGeeks-depth Documentation Hub with 120+ topics and Try it Yourself editors
LinkedIn-style direct messaging between users with typing indicators
Instagram-style avatar store with 75+ items, real-time preview, and GCoins
Progress report showing completed projects, current activity, and upcoming goals
Samsung-level SEO with sitemap served from backend as real XML
Full responsive design for mobile, tablet, and desktop
